tools.name: analyze_hiring_requirement
tools.description: Analyze raw client requirement, generate JD, detect missing gaps, and recommend follow-up questions.

tools.name: orchestrate_assessment
tools.description: Generate assessment path and evaluate audio, video, and final candidate score.

tools.name: match_candidate_to_job
tools.description: Score candidate-job fit using skills, experience, salary, notice, location, and evidence quality.

tools.name: generate_validate_trait_questions
tools.description: Generate, validate, rubric-map, and optionally evaluate trait questions.

tools.name: check_action_policy
tools.description: Check consent, source approval, protected attributes, auto-decision risk, and audit controls.
